purpose: Consolidated cross-reference of every image asset under assets/images/ to its generation prompt (or documented reason it has none). Built by reading boss-concept-prompt-pack.json + all *.provenance.json sidecars + git history for non-AI renders; not hand-authored.
knownIssues: assets/images/battle/pilot/concept-broken-court-monarch-v02.png and assets/images/battle/pilot/concept-sung-hum-v01.png: the exact text sent to the generator has a documented divergence from the pack (see each entry's provenanceNote). Treat 'sentToGenerator' as ground truth for any regeneration, not 'packEnglish'.

assets/images/battle/pilot/concept-sung-hum-boss.png's provenance sidecar sits at assets/images/battle/world/concept-sung-hum-boss.provenance.json (wrong directory, content verified via sha256 match) -- left in place, belongs to a separate uncommitted workstream's file move; do not relocate without checking that workstream first.

RESOLVED 2026-07-24: assets/images/battle/world/cinder-span-topdown-plate.webp was found genuinely MISSING from its referenced path (git-deleted, only an untracked copy existed at pilot/) -- restored byte-exact from git HEAD (sha256 38ed32b7... verified). assets/images/battle/world/cinder-span-tactical-paper-plate.webp was confirmed present and unchanged from HEAD the whole time. Neither was regenerated (approved deployed art, user chose to keep as-is).

RESOLVED 2026-07-24: assets/images/battle/pilot/dusk-warden-idle-gti-refstyle.png had no recoverable provenance and was unreferenced by any runtime code -- regenerated via god-tibo-imagen (gti, codex-cli provider) with a new tracked prompt exploring the same commander design's spiked-halo/spear variant. Original (unprovenanced) bytes backed up out-of-tree, not restorable in-repo. New file has a full provenance.json sidecar.

RESOLVED 2026-07-24: 40 concept images under assets/images/battle/pilot/ (stage-boss concepts s1-s10, terrain plates, mob concepts, prop-item concepts, unit-archetype concepts) existed on disk with valid *.provenance.json sidecars but were never consolidated into this index. All 40 sha256 hashes verified against sidecar output.sha256 (zero mismatches). Added with a new 'runtimeStatus' field (status/purpose/runtimeEligible/license, sourced verbatim from each sidecar) since all 40 carry runtimeEligible=false / license=pending-runtime-rights-review -- this was previously untracked context. New categories introduced: stage-boss-concept (10), terrain (11), mob-concept (4), prop-item-concept (6), unit-archetype-concept (9).

No magenta, pink, or purple on the character. Isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF background. No shadow outside the feet.
